Play the over 6.5.2 units
High-confidence edge — 73% model conviction at 8.7K vs 6.5 line.
Sale is above average on whiff rate (29.5%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. SI is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. NYM is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 22.92%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. Very consistent output (σ1.5K) — model projection is reliable here.
Bet wins if
✓He logs his average 6.1 IP — enough PA to let Ks accumulate
✓SI converts two-strike counts (35% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
Bet loses if
✗Variance on any given start (σ1.5K) — projection is a median, not a floor

① Signal
Signal
Play the over 4.5.2 units
High-confidence edge — 72% model conviction at 6.3K vs 4.5 line.
Gilbert generates genuine swing-and-miss (30.2% WHF, above LG) — stuff can pile up Ks when working. CH is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. TOR is a mismatch for his arsenal — 19.02% MIX-K, 5+ pts below LG. These batters put his pitches in play. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.
Bet wins if
✓He logs his average 6.2 IP — enough PA to let Ks accumulate
✓CH converts two-strike counts (36% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Elite swing-and-miss stuff (30.2% WHF) — Ks can stack quickly when he's on
Bet loses if
✗TOR makes contact vs his pitch mix (19.9% MIX-K) — tough K environment today

Over 5.5 is the play.1 unit
Solid over edge at 6.6K vs 5.5. 62% CAP — standalone play, not a parlay filler.
Yamamoto is above average on whiff rate (28.6%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. SL is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. SD is a mild headwind — 22.82% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. Moderate variance (σ2.2K) — no major consistency flags.

✓He logs his average 6.5 IP — enough PA to let Ks accumulate

Brown is above average on whiff rate (26.7%) — solid enough to capitalize when lineup cooperates. CU is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. Lean over 4.5 — size down.0.5 unit

CIN is roughly neutral — 25.58% MIX-K close to league average. Moderate variance (σ1.7K) — no major consistency flags.

Imanaga generates genuine swing-and-miss (30.5% WHF, above LG) — stuff can pile up Ks when working. SI is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. STL is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 20.46%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. Moderate variance (σ2.3K) — no major consistency flags.
Bet wins if
✓SI converts two-strike counts (36% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late

Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.7 IP — short outings cap K upside hard

SL⭐ FF⭐ FS⭐ SI⭐ SW⭐ · MATCH: ELITE 44.8 · Arsenal: WEAK
L3 avg 1.7K · P3 avg 4.0K → ↓ FADING

▼ UNDER
L3.5
142 FD
BEFD has edge
1u
P(O) 24% · CAP 73%
σ 1.5 · Moderate
SIG 95 /99 STRONG
▾
▼ UNDER · 1u
CAP 73% · needs 41.3% (142) · model 76% (-313) · +34.5% edge
L3.5
142
① Signal
Signal
Under 3.5 is the play.1.5 units
Strong under signal — 76% model probability below 3.5 at 2.5K projected.
Littell is below average on swing-and-miss (14.9% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. Putaway pitch (SW) is below average — converting deep counts to Ks is a genuine weak spot. PIT is roughly neutral — 25.1% MIX-K close to league average. He's cooled off recently — factor into your confidence.
⚠ Best value at the 3.5 alt line vs the 2.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 5.5) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Weak finishing pitch (SW at 18% putaway) — survives on weak contact, not strikeouts
✓Short average outing (4.6 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling

Signal
Lean under 5.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Under edge present (4.0K vs 5.5), 76% confidence — lean only.
Rocker sits around league average on whiff rate (24.8%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. CH is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. DET is roughly neutral — 24.6% MIX-K close to league average. Very consistent output (σ1.1K) — model projection is reliable here.
⚠ Best value at the 5.5 alt line vs the 4.5 market main — be on the right number.

Bet loses if

Lean under 4.5 — size down.0.5 unit
Under edge present (3.4K vs 4.5), 72% confidence — lean only.
Kelly is below average on swing-and-miss (21.3% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. SI is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. MIL is a mild headwind — 23.56% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. Very consistent output (σ1.3K) — model projection is reliable here.
⚠ Best value at the 4.5 alt line vs the 3.5 market main — be on the right number.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 5.2) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Short average outing (6.3 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗SI is an out pitch (25% putaway) — if he gets deep in counts, Ks follow

Wacha sits around league average on whiff rate (22.3%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. SL is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. PHI is a mild headwind — 24.2% MIX-K just below average vs his specific stuff. He's in form — recent trend is a tailwind.
Bet wins if
✓He logs his average 6.4 IP — enough PA to let Ks accumulate
✓SL converts two-strike counts (26% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
Bet loses if
✗Variance on any given start (σ1.9K) — projection is a median, not a floor

① Signal
Signal
Pass.Pass
Model projects 4.9K vs 4.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Manaea sits around league average on whiff rate (23.9%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. FC is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. ATL is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 21.62%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. Very consistent output (σ0.8K) — model projection is reliable here.
Bet wins if
✓FC converts two-strike counts (28% putaway rate) — batters can't put it in play late
✓Consistent output (σ0.8K) — model projection is reliable, not driven by one outlier
Bet loses if
✗He averages only 5.0 IP — short outings cap K upside hard
✗First-pitch strike rate (55%) is low — he'll work from behind and generate weak contact, not Ks

Pass.Pass
Model projects 2.9K vs 3.5 — edge too thin to take a side.
Civale is below average on swing-and-miss (20.3% WHF vs 25% LG) — needs favorable conditions to reach Ks. SL is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. MIA is tougher than it looks — MIX-K% drops to 21.42%, below league average vs his specific pitch mix. Very consistent output (σ1.5K) — model projection is reliable here.
Bet wins if
✓Low strikeout rate (K/9 6.4) — he misses bats infrequently, line is inflated
✓Elite first-pitch strike rate (66%) — batters put the ball in play early, not deep counts
✓Short average outing (4.7 IP) — fewer PA limits total K ceiling
Bet loses if
✗SL is an out pitch (24% putaway) — if he gets deep in counts, Ks follow

Ray sits around league average on whiff rate (25.4%) — relies more on weak contact than pure swing-and-miss. SI is an effective two-strike weapon — batters who get deep in counts are in trouble. COL is roughly neutral — 25.58% MIX-K close to league average. Moderate variance (σ1.9K) — no major consistency flags.

MODEL
signals · methodology · card guide · v9.9
Performance Tracker
through 2026-07-04

Live results by signal tier — updated each session. ROI uses actual FD odds. Bias = avg(actual − projected Ks), positive means model over-projects. MAE = mean absolute projection error in Ks.

■ Win rate bar fills to actual %▲ Bias positive = model tends to over-project Ks◆ MAE in strikeouts — lower is better● Bias within range
Signal Tiers — What Each Badge Means
STRONG · 2uHighest conviction. Model projects meaningfully more Ks than the line with strong probability and high confidence across multiple signals. Recommended 2 unit bet.
MOD · 1uModerate conviction. Clear edge vs the line with reasonable confidence. Standard 1 unit bet (1.5u when confidence is elevated and variance is low).
LEAN O · 0.5uDirectional lean over. Model sees an edge but confidence or probability does not clear the full action threshold. Half unit only.
LEAN U · 0.5uDirectional lean under. Model projects below the line with some confidence but not enough for full conviction. Half unit only.
UNDER · 1uHigh conviction fade. Model projects meaningfully fewer Ks than the line with strong confidence. 1 unit bet (1.5u when confidence is highest).
WATCH ⇑⇓Signal exists but does not clear the action threshold — confidence too low or variance too high. No bet recommended. Orange = over direction, Silver = under. Blocker reason shown on the card.
PASSNo meaningful signal. Model projects close to the line or insufficient data to form a view.
CAP — Model Confidence

CAP (0-100%) measures how aligned the signals are — not a win probability. High CAP means multiple independent signals point the same direction. Used to gate tier assignment — higher tiers require higher CAP.

Reading a Card
PROJ strip — model projection, edge vs line, P(over), CAP confidence
L10 form bar — last 10 starts coloured by above/below projection
Arsenal panel — pitch mix with whiff% and putaway%. P·WHF = pitcher whiff rate. OPP·WHF = lineup average whiff rate vs that pitch
Lineup panel — confirmed batting order with per-batter K% and whiff%. Green = pitcher advantage, Red = batter advantage
OPP K-MIX strip — BBRef season team K% vs MIX-K% weighted by this pitcher's specific pitch mix
Implied Odds box — probability of clearing each alt line as American odds. BET = recommended line, MKT = market main
Signal strip — action summary, unit size, key reason for signal
Data Sources
Live each session — pitcher L10 K counts, IP, ERA · FanDuel alt lines and odds · confirmed lineups
Savant CSV — batter K%/whiff%/xBA per pitch type · pitcher arsenal whiff%/FPS%/putaway%
Researched — team wRC+ by handedness · L10 runs/game · park factors · bullpen ERA · BBRef team K% splits
Not included — live Statcast splits · bullpen usage · real-time injury status beyond confirmed lineup
Hits TabBETA

P(≥1 hit) for each batter tonight. Built from confirmed lineups and pitcher arsenal data. Sorted by edge vs FanDuel's posted hit line. Early stage — no bullpen data or recent trends. Large edges often reflect model limitations, not market errors.

⚠ For informational and entertainment purposes only. Projections are model outputs — not guarantees. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Bet responsibly.

↑
